sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65724" key="meilixo/dwros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μειλῐχό-δωρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n65724.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">giving pleasing gifts</tr_>, [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">οἶνος</foreign>] <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0252.tlg001:82:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hermipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">82.2</biblScope> </bibl>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Υγίεια</foreign> Hymn. ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.1.31a</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
